texto: ...I try to incorporate life's lessons from everyone around me and pay it forward anytime I can. I look at every person I meet as a new and thrilling experience with which I'm gifted. Every new city or country or continent that I visit is a beautiful exploration from which I can learn. Every new client or project represents the possibility of meeting new people and having new adventures.
explicacao: Citação de Andrea Michaels sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “...I try to incorporate life's lessons from everyone around me and pay it forward anytime I can. …” articula sabedoria, exploration, lessons em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como lessons e outlook.

texto: Friendship is the most important thing in my life. It's rare to have friends like I've got. If I had as great a taste in husbands as I have in friends, what an even better life I would have had!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Andrea Michaels: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Friendship is the most important thing in my life. It's rare to have friends like I've got. If I …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, lessons, relationhips pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e lessons.

texto: Sharing your success with others reveals your true humanity. Don't ever be afraid to open your heart to that practice. It has made all the world of difference to me.
